title: Superior Foil Containers with Lids – 1.5 Litre Sturdy Deep Foil Trays with Lids - Ideal for Baking, Roasting, BBQ, Cooking Meal Prep Tray – Pack of 20 Foil Trays With Lids
features: Durable Construction: These premium-grade takeaway containers with lids are designed to handle even the heaviest meals without bending or crumpling. Ideal foil trays for curries, stews, and other hearty dishes, they maintain their shape under pressure

Secure, Spill-Proof Lids: Equipped with snug-fitting the lids won’t pop off, these food containers with lids provide a tight seal, keeping your food fresh and preventing any messy spills while storing or transporting

Generous Capacity: Superior Pack of 20 take away containers with lid accommodates two to four generous servings per piece with their 1.5 Liter size, making it perfect for meal prepping large portions or freezing lasagna, casseroles, and more

Freezer-Safe and Oven-Ready: Designed to handle temperature extremes, these aluminium foil trays can go directly from freezer to oven. Perfect tin foil containers with lids for reheating meals without any transfer, saving you time and effort

Multi-Purpose Versatility: Whether it’s for meal prepping, storing leftovers, or freezing meals in advance, these sturdy tin foil trays are ideal for a wide range of dishes, from curries to casseroles and everything in between. Perfect for home kitchens, catering, or meal prep businesses
description: Make it a breeze for meal prep and storage with these 1.5L disposable food containers. Built from high-quality, thick aluminum, these foil baking trays are designed to hold up to the weight and heat of large, saucy meals without crumpling or tearing. The secure-fitting foil food containers with lids lock in freshness and prevent leaks, making them ideal for transporting meals or storing food in the fridge or freezer. With a spacious 1.5L capacity, each aluminium foil trays with lids easily holds two portions—perfect for preparing family-sized meals or freezing leftovers. These versatile foil containers are also oven-ready, allowing for easy reheating without the need to transfer food to another dish. Ideal for lasagna, casseroles, curries, and more, these foil trays for baking make meal prep easy and hassle-free.
